name: Tappan Hill Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8x11 inch pan.
3. Break the semisweet and unsweetened chocolate into 1-ounce pieces.
4. Bring the butter to a boil in a medium saucepan. Add both chocolates and immediately remove from heat. Stir until the chocolate melts completely.
5. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl; set aside.
6. In the bowl of an electric mixer, combine the eggs and sugar. Beat until the mixture is very thick and forms ribbons when you lift the beaters away from the batter.
7. Add the vanilla and blend lightly.
8. Add the melted chocolate and mix lightly.
9. Gently fold the flour mixture into the chocolate batter with a spatula.
10. Fold in the chocolate chips and nuts.
11. Spread batter in the greased pan.
12. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center has a little batter clinging to it. Do not overbake. Cool in the pan.
